# PostLogistics Shipping - “Barcode” web service

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:9d078ad6b2092c6e36929b761e1500a8605156e02fadc930202cbe8da8831445
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module uses [PostLogistics BarCodes WebService] to generate labels
for your Delivery Orders.

It adds a `Create label` button on Delivery Orders.
A generated label will be an attachement of your Delivery Order.

To see it, please install documents module.

You can create multiple delivery method to match your diffent package types.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

:::{important}
A "Swiss Post Business customer" account is required to use this module.

See [Log in]
:::

To configure:

- Go to `Inventory -> Configuration -> Delivery -> Shipping Methods`
- Create new shipping methods for PostLogistics and set your login informations in the "PostLogistics" tab
- Go to `Inventory -> Configuration ->  Delivery -> Delivery Packages` to create
  the PostLogistics delivery packaging with the relevant `Package Code` (see section 8.10 of <https://developer.post.ch/en/digital-commerce-api> for available codes)

### Technical references

["Barcode" web service documentation]

## Known issues / Roadmap

- Integration of price webservice :
  <https://www.post.ch/en/customer-center/all-online-services/preise-berechnen/info>
- Not sure if the recursive patch of suds is still needed as there's no need
  to use the integration WS anymore. However we still want to patch open to
  get meaningful error messages.

classes.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.models.postlogistics_shipping_label.PostlogisticsShippingLabel
documentation: Child class of ir attachment to identify which are labels

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.models.stock_package_type.PackageType._get_packaging_codes
documentation: Return the list of packaging codes

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.models.delivery_carrier.DeliveryCarrier.onchange_prod_environment
documentation:
Auto change the end point url following the environment
- Test: https://wedecint.post.ch/
- Prod: https://wedec.post.ch/

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.models.delivery_carrier.DeliveryCarrier.postlogistics_send_shipping
documentation:
It will generate the labels for all the packages of the picking.
Packages are mandatory in this case

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.models.stock_quant_package.StockQuantPackage.postlogistics_cod_amount
documentation:
Return the PostLogistics Cash on Delivery amount of a package

If we have only 1 package which delivers the whole sales order
we use the total amount of the sales order.

Otherwise we don't know the value of each package so we raise an
error and the user has to write the prices on the packages.

When a price is manually set on a package, it's always used as the
cash on delivery amount.

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.models.stock_picking.StockPicking._get_packages_from_picking
documentation: Get all the packages from the picking

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.models.stock_picking.StockPicking.attach_shipping_label
documentation: Attach a label returned by generate_shipping_labels to a picking

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.models.stock_picking.StockPicking._set_a_default_package
documentation:
Pickings using this module must have a package
If not this method put it one silently

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.models.stock_picking.StockPicking.postlogistics_cod_amount
documentation:
Return the PostLogistics Cash on Delivery amount of a picking

If the picking delivers the whole sales order, we use the total
amount of the sales order.

Otherwise, we don't know the value of each picking so we raise
an error.  The user has to create packages with the cash on
delivery price on each package.

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.models.stock_picking.StockPicking.write_tracking_number_label
documentation:
If there are no pack defined, write tracking_number on picking
otherwise, write it on parcel_tracking field of each pack.
Note we can receive multiple labels for a same package

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.models.stock_picking.StockPicking._generate_postlogistics_label
documentation: Generate labels and write tracking numbers received

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.models.stock_picking.StockPicking._cleanup_error_message
documentation: Cleanup HTML error message to be readable by users.

classes.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.tests.test_sanitize_values.TestSanitizeValues
documentation:
Just create records full of disallowed chars, an test that everyone of them
is correctly removed, as none of those chars should be sent on postlogistics api.

classes.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.postlogistics.web_service.PostlogisticsWebService

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.postlogistics.web_service.PostlogisticsWebService._get_language
documentation:
Return a language to iso format from odoo format.

`iso_code` field in res.lang is not mandatory thus not always set.
Use partner language if available, otherwise use english

```
param partner

partner browse record

return

language code to use.
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.postlogistics.web_service.PostlogisticsWebService._prepare_recipient
documentation:
Create a ns0:Recipient as a dict from a partner

```
param partner

partner browse record
```

\:return a dict containing data for ns0:Recipient

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.postlogistics.web_service.PostlogisticsWebService._prepare_customer
documentation:
Create a ns0:Customer as a dict from picking

This is the PostLogistics Customer, thus the sender

```
param picking

picking browse record
```

\:return a dict containing data for ns0:Customer

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.postlogistics.web_service.PostlogisticsWebService._get_label_layout
documentation: Get Label layout define in carrier

documentation: Get Output format define in carrier

documentation: Get Output Resolution Code define in carrier

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.postlogistics.web_service.PostlogisticsWebService._get_license
documentation:
Get the license

Take it from carrier and if not defined get the first license.

```
return

license number
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.postlogistics.web_service.PostlogisticsWebService._get_itemid
documentation:
Allowed characters are alphanumeric plus `+`, `-` and `_`
Last `+` separates picking name and package number (if any)

:return string: itemid

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.postlogistics.web_service.PostlogisticsWebService._get_item_number
documentation:
Generate the tracking reference for the last 8 digits
of tracking number of the label.

2 first digits for a pack counter
6 last digits for the picking name

e.g. 03000042 for 3rd pack of picking OUT/19000042

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_postlogistics.postlogistics.web_service.PostlogisticsWebService._prepare_item_list
documentation: Return a list of item made from the pickings

documentation:
Generate a label for a picking

```
param picking

picking browse record

param user_lang

OpenERP language code

param packages

browse records of packages to filter on

return

{

}

source:12: (WARNING/2) Block quote ends without a blank line; unexpected unindent.

Treating it as ordinary text because it's so short.

]

```

}

Connector with PostLogistics for labels using post.ch API

Handbook available here:
https://developer.post.ch/en/digital-commerce-api
https://wedec.post.ch/doc/swagger/index.html?
    url=https://wedec.post.ch/doc/api/barcode/v1/swagger.yaml
    #/Barcode/generateAddressLabel

Allows to generate labels
